title: The Destined Three
overview: As he watches the famed Toake Daigo pull off another rescue so daring others might think it impossible, Fire Sergeant Onoda Shun thinks back to their days in special rescue training together, and how their working relationship began.

title: Firefighter
overview: The "destined three" are assigned to a firefighting exercise together, where they must rescue a dummy from a training building that's really on fire. When they realize a true survivor would never survive the smoke, a difficult decision awaits them...

title: The God of Rescue
overview: Daigo, Shun, and Yuki struggle to complete their task in the fire fighting training tower. Yamagami's evaluation of their group is not at all what they expect, but they learn about an additional rule of the Special Rescue Corps.

title: Fuwa Special Rescue Corps
overview: Half a year after their training, Shun is finally going to work with Daigo in the Fuwa Fire Station’s Special Rescue Squad. He’s nervous about his first day when suddenly they have to move out! On the scene, Daigo does something surprising!
“Please let me go.” With those words, Daigo actually dislocates his own shoulder and goes into the crevice in the rubble. What an unbelievably calm way to continue the rescue mission.

title: Toake Daigo
overview: After his heroic efforts in Ariwara district, Daigo is hospitalized. In fact, he had dislocated his shoulders many times in his past and was scolded for it by the nurses. While talking, Daigo remembers the time he became “Toake Daigo.”

title: My Hero
overview: The fire at Hotel New Snysis was called the worst fire in history. Even though Yuki lost four members of her family in that fire, she still aspired to become a firefighter, with a certain heroic “Legendary Rescue Corps Member” in her heart.

title: The Three in the Basement
overview: With a typhoon approaching, Shun and his squad have to move out. For some reason, Daigo ends up being locked in the basement! Will they be able to rescue the survivors as the rain water keeps flowing into the basement?

title: Mission
overview: The typhoon has caused severe flooding. Shun and Igarashi dive into the water with their respirators to help Daigo and the survivors from a basement that is steadily filling with rain water.

title: The Auspicious "Fire Company M"
overview: The door that had trapped Daigo and the two survivors is finally open. Where will the water that rushes out in an instant take them?! Meanwhile, Shun was diving underwater with his face mask on for the rescue operation...

title: The True Sign of a Buddy
overview: The Fuwa Rescue Corps is on the scene at a collapsed street. A car has fallen into the hole, so Daigo and Shun descend using the flexible ladder mounted on their truck. That’s when Daigo senses something...

title: The Job of Those in Orange
overview: At the scene of a collapsed street, Daigo and Shun discover a car with a survivor buried in the sand. However, nothing they do seems to work and they can’t make any progress. That’s when they suggest pulling out the car with the truck’s ladder, but...

title: Their Respective Emotions
overview: Daigo and Shun can’t shake the fact that they failed to save the pregnant woman at the collapsed road. Meanwhile, the 1st squad member of Shogadani Rescue, Matoi Sadaie, and Nagata Sakura meet in an unlikely location.

title: The National Firefighter Rescue Technique Tournament
overview: Fuwa Fire Station has begun training for the National Fire Fighter Rescue Technique Tournament. Meanwhile, Yuki’s first mission in Fire Company M is to take first place in the tournament’s individual rope bridge traversal discipline.

title: Special Order Dispatch
overview: Fuwa Rescue and Shougadani Rescue have come to train for the Tokyo Fire Department’s internal selection tournament. While all of them are focused on their training, a fire breaks out in a high rise building. Both squads receive a special order dispatch.

title: Morse Code
overview: Fuwa Rescue and Shougadani Rescue are on the scene of the fire at the high-rise building. There should be many people in need of rescue at the internet café where the fire broke out, but for some reason, almost nobody is there...

title: Asahina Daigo
overview: With the additional help of Yuki and Toyomu, Daigo and Shun manage to rescue every single person. A few days later, the two of them get summoned to the district headquarters for a debriefing, where they get subjected to a behavioral audit, but then...
